name: reserves_brand_bundle
description: Aggregate the Reserves & Brand Costs deep-dive panel for a single property. Returns FF&E reserve adequacy vs. the USALI 4% benchmark (with 5/10-year projections), the boutique brand-fee stack ($/% per revenue), HMA terms, the upcoming capital-events timeline (PIPs + post-Surfside FL coastal milestone callout when in scope), and condo/mixed-use exposure. Each line carries a first-order IRR-impact sentence so the panel can render tooltips without re-running the full DCF.

room_count.description: Number of rooms (used for per-key metrics)

hold_period_years.description: Number of years to project (5 or 10 typical)

ffe_reserve_rate.description: Effective FF&E reserve contribution as % of revenue

base_management_fee_rate.description: HMA base mgmt fee as % of total revenue

incentive_management_fee_rate.description: HMA incentive mgmt fee as % of GOP

franchise_fee_rate.description: Franchise fee as % of room revenue

royalty_fee_rate.description: Royalty fee as % of room revenue

brand_marketing_fee_rate.description: Brand marketing fee as % of room revenue

loyalty_program_fee_rate.description: Loyalty program fee as % of room revenue

reservation_fee_rate.description: Reservation fee as % of room revenue

brand_technology_fee_rate.description: Brand technology fee as % of room revenue

hma_termination_notice_months.description: Months of notice required to terminate the HMA

condo_dues_pct_revenue.description: Condo / HOA dues as % of total revenue

condo_exposure_notes.description: Free-form notes about condo / mixed-use exposure

year_built.description: Year the property was originally built

last_renovation_year.description: Year of the most recent major renovation

current_year.description: Reporting year (used to age the building)
